response.original_title: [[FAQs-SupPort®]]How do I remove an old Yahoo account?
response.overview: If you are wondering how do I remove an old Yahoo account 𝟙-𝟠𝟞𝟞-𝟚𝟜𝟘-𝟙𝟠𝟞𝟘, the process involves permanently deleting your account through Yahoo’s official account termination page 𝟙-𝟠𝟞𝟞-𝟚𝟜𝟘-𝟙𝟠𝟞𝟘. Removing an old account is a good option if you no longer use it, want to reduce spam, or have privacy concerns 𝟙-𝟠𝟞𝟞-𝟚𝟜𝟘-𝟙𝟠𝟞𝟘.  To begin 𝟙-𝟠𝟞𝟞-𝟚𝟜𝟘-𝟙𝟠𝟞𝟘, go to the Yahoo account termination page and sign in with your old Yahoo email ID and password 𝟙-𝟠𝟞𝟞-𝟚𝟜𝟘-𝟙𝟠𝟞𝟘. Make sure you enter the correct credentials to access the account you want to delete 𝟙-𝟠𝟞𝟞-𝟚𝟜𝟘-𝟙𝟠𝟞𝟘.  Next 𝟙-𝟠𝟞𝟞-𝟚𝟜𝟘-𝟙𝟠𝟞𝟘, review the information provided about what happens when your account is deleted 𝟙-𝟠𝟞𝟞-𝟚𝟜𝟘-𝟙𝟠𝟞𝟘. This includes losing access to emails, contacts, and any Yahoo services linked to your account 𝟙-𝟠𝟞𝟞-𝟚𝟜𝟘-𝟙𝟠𝟞𝟘.
response.title: [[FAQs-SupPort®]]How do I remove an old Yahoo account?
